payloads.text:
No diff — the v2 method.tex is identical to v1. Writer didn't actually modify it. The "826词完成" report was likely a false positive or Writer just confirmed the existing content.

The method needs expansion from 1258→~1650 words per the Reviewer's feedback. I'll need to re-dispatch this task once the other Writer tasks complete, or handle it myself if Writer keeps failing at expansion (per P4/P7 lessons).

For now, let me wait for the other 3 Writer tasks (BG, Intro, Abstract expand) before taking action. No need to message the user about this yet — I'll batch the status update once all tasks are in.
